answer:
To authenticate with the Selling Partner API (SP-API), you must use Login with Amazon (LWA) to obtain an access token [1][2]. For most operations, you exchange a long-lived refresh token for a short-lived LWA access token (valid for one hour) by sending a POST request to `https://api.amazon.com/auth/o2/token` with your client credentials and the refresh token [1][3].

For grantless operations, use the `client_credentials` grant type with a scope parameter instead of a refresh token [1][4][5]. When accessing restricted data (PII), use the Tokens API to retrieve a Restricted Data Token (RDT) [1][6]. Include the resulting `access_token` or `RDT` in the `x-amz-access-token` header for your API requests [1][6][3].

```http
POST /auth/o2/token HTTP/1.1
Host: api.amazon.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8
grant_type=refresh_token
&refresh_token=YOUR_REFRESH_TOKEN
&client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID
&client_secret=YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET
```
